rule_1_attacking_formation.name: Shift to Attacking Formation When Trailing
rule_1_attacking_formation.description: Shift to more attacking formation when trailing to increase attacking threat
rule_1_attacking_formation.action: Shift to more attacking formation (add extra attacker)
rule_1_attacking_formation.rationale: Trailing by goal - need to increase attacking threat

rule_2_defensive_formation.name: Defensive Formation When Protecting Early Lead
rule_2_defensive_formation.description: Consolidate with defensive formation when protecting early lead
rule_2_defensive_formation.rationale: Protecting early lead - defensive stability preferred

rule_3_midfield_control.name: Add Midfielder for Possession Control
rule_3_midfield_control.description: Add midfielder to control possession in midfield when losing battles there

rule_4_defensive_reinforcement.name: Defensive Reinforcement When Conceding Chances
rule_4_defensive_reinforcement.description: Shift to more defensive formation when conceding too many chances
rule_4_defensive_reinforcement.action: Reinforce defense with extra defender or DM
rule_4_defensive_reinforcement.rationale: Opponent creating too many clear-cut chances
